query:
SELECT 
  name,
  beachesLocalRules
FROM island_guides
LIMIT 5
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3FFv3TtDUeNbYDM.root --database JUCCYykxYWxAcNny3wop55 --execute SELECT 
  name,
  beachesLocalRules
FROM island_guides
LIMIT 5

rows.name: Malé
rows.beachesLocalRules: {"beaches": [{"description": "The primary beach area for visitors with clear turquoise waters and white sand", "facilities": "Changing rooms, showers, sun loungers available", "name": "Main Tourist Beach"}, {"description": "Traditional beach area used by local residents", "facilities": "Basic facilities, more authentic experience", "name": "Local Beach"}], "localRules": {"alcohol": "Alcohol is not permitted on local islands. Only available at resort islands", "beachBehavior": "Do not remove coral, shells, or marine life. Reef-safe sunscreen is recommended", "culturalSensitivity": "The Maldives is a Muslim country. Be respectful of local customs and traditions", "dressCode": "Dress modestly in public areas. Swimwear is acceptable on beaches and at resorts, but cover up when visiting local islands or shops", "photography": "Sunset photography is popular but be respectful of prayer times", "prayerTimes": "Respect prayer times (5 daily prayers). Shops may close during prayer times. Avoid loud music and activities"}}
